title: AsaThorr's pack sword overlay
description: An overlay for my resource pack that replaces the swords with more vanilla 16x variants.
body:
An add-on for my PvP resource pack that changes the 64x sword models back to more vanilla-like 16x models, while keeping the theme and visual knockback feature.

### Add-on features :

- Vanilla-like 16x models, modified to fit the main pack's theme
- Visible knockback, using the 1.21.5 resource pack updates (red guard for knockback 1, green guard for knockback 2, unchanged for non knockback swords)

### Main pack's features (separate download) :

It is currently a work in progress, these may change in the future

- Black and red theme, and a custom fitting skybox for Skyboxify mod users
- 32x tools, better bows and crossbows
- Visual clues for knockback, density/breach and potion potency
- UI improvements, designed for PvP, removing fishing bobber and multiple other inconvenient textures and overlays
- Custom environment/block textures

## MAIN PACK :
- https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/asathorrs-pvp-resource-pack

/!\ Due to the absence of CIT folder, this resource pack will not work in version 1.21.4 and under, even if you have CIT resewn mod.
